---
title: Actualités de l'ALiSP
comments: false

page-layout: full
format:
  hebstr-template-html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1200px
      margin-width: 500px

listing:
  - id: blog-posts
    contents:
      - "blog/**/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    fields:
      - date
      - title
      - reading-time
      - image
      - description
      - categories
    feed: true
    image-align: right
    
margin-footer: |
  <a
    href="{{< var links.clisp >}}"
    class="page-sidebar"
    target="_blank"
    rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <img
      src="/_resources/images/clisp_nl.png"
      alt="Newsletters du CLiSP"
      loading="lazy"
      style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
  </a>
---
